prompt: Create an ultra-realistic black-and-white stippling ink portrait of a beautiful young South Asian woman, shown from the chest up in a centered, formal ID-style composition. She faces directly forward with a calm, confident neutral expression, symmetrical features, large expressive eyes, full softly shaded lips, and smooth youthful skin rendered entirely through millions of tiny black ink dots with exceptional tonal depth. She wears large black rounded cat-eye glasses with warm translucent amber lenses, with subtle highlights and visible tiny hinge details. Her dark hair in a loose high messy bun with a center part, voluminous strands, wispy flyaway hairs, and loose tendrils framing the face is drawn with dense fine ink hatching and stippled shadows. Dress her in a dark tailored business suit jacket, crisp white collared shirt, and black necktie. Use a vintage technical drawing aesthetic on an off-white textured paper background with faint construction grid lines and delicate drafting marks. The portrait should be highly detailed, monochrome ink with realistic facial anatomy, soft stipple gradients, sharp focus on the face and glasses, shoulders fading into loose unfinished dotted sketch edges at the bottom and sides. No text, no watermark, no color except the subtle warm tint in the lenses.
promptEn: Create an ultra-realistic black-and-white stippling ink portrait of a beautiful young South Asian woman, shown from the chest up in a centered, formal ID-style composition. She faces directly forward with a calm, confident neutral expression, symmetrical features, large expressive eyes, full softly shaded lips, and smooth youthful skin rendered entirely through millions of tiny black ink dots with exceptional tonal depth. She wears large black rounded cat-eye glasses with warm translucent amber lenses, with subtle highlights and visible tiny hinge details. Her dark hair in a loose high messy bun with a center part, voluminous strands, wispy flyaway hairs, and loose tendrils framing the face is drawn with dense fine ink hatching and stippled shadows. Dress her in a dark tailored business suit jacket, crisp white collared shirt, and black necktie. Use a vintage technical drawing aesthetic on an off-white textured paper background with faint construction grid lines and delicate drafting marks. The portrait should be highly detailed, monochrome ink with realistic facial anatomy, soft stipple gradients, sharp focus on the face and glasses, shoulders fading into loose unfinished dotted sketch edges at the bottom and sides. No text, no watermark, no color except the subtle warm tint in the lenses.
promptZh: 创作一张超写实的黑白点画风格肖像，主角为 一位美丽的南亚裔年轻女性，采用胸部以上居中、正式证件照式的构图。她正对镜头，表情冷静自信且自然，五官对称，双眸明亮传神，双唇饱满且带有柔和阴影，年轻细腻的皮肤完全由数百万个细小的黑色墨点呈现，具有极佳的色调深度。她佩戴着 一副黑色大号圆框猫眼眼镜，配有温暖的半透明琥珀色镜片，镜片带有微妙的高光和清晰可见的微小铰链细节。她的 深色头发梳成松散的高丸子头，中分发型，发量丰盈，带有几缕凌乱的发丝和修饰脸型的碎发 通过密集的细墨线排线和点画阴影绘制而成。为她穿上 深色剪裁利落的商务西装外套、挺括的白色衬衫和黑色领带。采用复古工程制图美学，背景为带有淡淡网格线和精致绘图标记的米白色纹理纸。肖像应高度精细，采用单色墨水绘制，具备写实的脸部解剖结构，柔和的点画渐变，焦点清晰地聚焦在脸部和眼镜上，肩部向底部和两侧逐渐过渡为松散、未完成的点状素描边缘。画面无文字、无水印，除镜片中微妙的暖色调外，不含任何其他颜色。
